title: cli-opencode `</dev/null` stdin-redirect fix
description: Add `</dev/null` to all 4 deep-research/deep-review YAML workflow `if_cli_opencode` dispatches, the cli-opencode skill (SKILL.md/README/references/assets), 2 stress-test dispatch scripts, and the cli-opencode CHANGELOG. opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation; non-interactive automation that redirects stdout/stderr without explicit closed stdin hangs forever at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. The 9-character `</dev/null` redirect provides EOF on stdin and unblocks the dispatch.
